title: How Praying for Her Before You've Met Her Changes the Man You Become
caption:
Most guys pray God would send her. Pray instead that God keeps building the man she'd actually need to find.

The season before her isn't dead time. It's where patience, self-control, and a steady walk with God get built, the exact things a marriage will ask of you later. A man chasing a relationship performs for it. A man chasing God just gets built.

Let your prayer for her outlast your urgency for her.

#faith #singlelife #christianman #godlyman #relationships
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
